results.rendered_html:
ud-√ās Ā. -āste, to sit separate or away from, sit on one side or apart;
to abstain from participating in;
to take no interest in, be unconcerned about, be indifferent or passive,  MBh. ;  BhP. ;  Śiś.  &c.;
to pass by, omit,  Sarvad.

results.rendered_html: udās 2 A. [ud-ās] To be indifferent or unconcerned, be careless or apathetic; to be passive or inactive; tatkimityudāsate bharatāḥ  Māl. 1 ; vidhāya vairaṃ sāmarṣe naro'rau ya udāsate  Śi. 2. 42 ;  Bg. 9. 9 ; Sān.  K. 20 ; not to share in, show no interest in;  Mu. 1.
